prestazioni: Garrett GT2867 .64 A/R turbo upgrade for the LF-VE (2.3L MZR DISI Turbo) engine, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter by TurboSmart for optimized spool and flow while maintaining emissions compliance

Full bolt-on fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to mitigate oil dilution in the LF-VE’s direct-injection system under high boost

Custom ECU reflash via Cobb Accessport v3 with a Stage 2+ aggressive timing map (22 psi peak boost), optimized for E85 blends (up to 30% ethanol content) and paired with a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve to prevent compressor surge on gear shifts
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Atenza-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami 19x9.5 +30 wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 265/30/19 tires for aggressive stance and track-ready grip
Seibon Carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for LF-VE intercooler cooling, finished in matte clear coat to match the OEM Mazda Soul Red Crystal paint (code: 46V)

Full interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage by Cusco (Type-RS) with bolt-in door bars for FIA homologation
